title: The Hot New Place for Singles
description: Newsletter writers are playing cupid with their like-minded readers.

title: Democrats’ Great Alaskan Hope
description: Mary Peltola, the Democrat most likely to win a red-state Senate seat this year, is largely unknown outside her home state. That’s not a coincidence.

title: Paradise Revisited
description: What Darwin saw in the Galápagos

description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.

title: Photos: A Bear-Emergency-Response Drill in Japan
description: With a recent increase in bear sightings and incidents in rural Japan, local communities are taking steps to prepare for such encounters. In the small city of Yaita, officials and residents worked tog
author: Alan Taylor

title: I’d Rather Risk Cancer Than See AI Move This Fast
description: I’d benefit if AI cured cancer. And I still want AI progress to slow down.
author: Emma Pierson

title: J. D. Vance’s AI Doctrine
description: The vice president is making a case that is part Silicon Valley, part MAGA.

title: The Warrior-Witches of Ukraine’s Resistance
description: An underground intelligence network uses subterfuge and honey traps to direct drone strikes deep inside Russian-occupied territory.

description: Panelists joined to discuss what the signing of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran could mean for the two countries, and more.

title: Why Adventure Matters
description: Adventure may have less to do with where you go than with your willingness to leave the familiar behind.

description: A weight-loss medication eased Serena Williams’s comeback. Experts can’t agree on whether that counts as doping.

title: This Founding Father Died in Disgrace. But He Can’t Be Forgotten.
description: Excluded from America’s origin story, James Wilson may have been the most influential, prescient, and democratic drafter of the Constitution.

title: Science Has a Name for What’s Plaguing the Reflecting Pool
description: Testing reveals that efforts to suppress one algal bloom seem to be fueling another.
